reviews.comment:
Buen precio y atención. Se forman muy largas filas pero, dentro de todo, atienden rápido.

(Translated by Google)
Good prices and service. There are often very long lines, but overall, they serve you quickly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzenB5WUVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Fuimos dia de semana, no habia nada de fila para cargar combustible. No pudimos canjear km con la ypf serviclub, solo los domingos se canjea...nos dijeron.

(Translated by Google)
We went on a weekday, there was no line to fill up. We couldn't redeem kilometers with the YPF Serviclub; they told us it's only redeemable on Sundays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMW9yQmJnEAE

reviews.comment:
El mejor balneario de punta mogotes mar del plata lo tiene el Automóvil Club Argentino!!! Lindo limpio completo excelente atención. Lo único hay una chica rubia muy joven de administración para alquilar carpas que atiende muy mal.

(Translated by Google)
The best beach resort in Punta Mogotes, Mar del Plata, is the Automóvil Club Argentino! It's beautiful, clean, and has excellent service. The only downside is a very young, blonde woman in the administration office who rents beach tents and provides very poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbHBpcDJ3RRAB
